description: Style Note This lotto shoe is the perfect response to Indian weather - lightweight and easy on the pocket! This shoe offers a comfy ride and is perfect for fun fridays at work. You can also use this shoe for an early morning jog in the park. Product Details Round toed white casual shoe with perforations on the upper and central lace-ups Padded tongue and inner PU midsole TPU outsole with terraced lugs Material and Care Synthetic Wipe with clean dry cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
